title: nephrodium arbuscula
intro: Nephrodium arbuscula, also known as the fern-like plant, is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Nephrodium arbuscula include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and aid in wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
